# Cogito — Révisions Bac de philosophie

> Cogito — Révisions Bac de philosophie : 6 séquences, fiches, philosophes, notions, glossaire, frise, quiz et flashcards.

Site interactif : https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/
Index des ressources brutes : https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/

## Séquences

- [Séquence I — La conscience de soi garantit-elle la connaissance de soi ?](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/sequence-1-conscience.md)
- [Séquence II — La vérité n'appartient-elle qu'aux domaines de la raison et de la science ?](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/sequence-2-verite.md)
- [Séquence III — Y a-t-il adéquation entre le langage et la pensée ?](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/sequence-3-langage.md)
- [Séquence IV — Comment définir l'art ?](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/sequence-4-definir.md)
- [Séquence V — Revient-il à l'État de décider de ce qui est juste ?](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/sequence-5-etat.md)
- [Séquence VI — A-t-on le devoir d'être heureux ?](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/sequence-6-devoir.md)

## Philosophes

- [Socrate — v. 470 – 399 av. J.-C.](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/socrate.md)
- [Platon — v. 428 – 348 av. J.-C.](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/platon.md)
- [Aristote — 384 – 322 av. J.-C.](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/aristote.md)
- [Épicure — 341 – 270 av. J.-C.](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/epicure.md)
- [Saint Augustin — 354 – 430](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/augustin.md)
- [Héraclite d'Éphèse — v. 500 av. J.-C.](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/heraclite.md)
- [René Descartes — 1596 – 1650](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/descartes.md)
- [Blaise Pascal — 1623 – 1662](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/pascal.md)
- [Baruch Spinoza — 1632 – 1677](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/spinoza.md)
- [G. W. Leibniz — 1646 – 1716](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/leibniz.md)
- [John Locke — 1632 – 1704](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/locke.md)
- [Thomas Hobbes — 1588 – 1679](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/hobbes.md)
- [Jean-Jacques Rousseau — 1712 – 1778](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/rousseau.md)
- [David Hume — 1711 – 1776](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/hume.md)
- [Emmanuel Kant — 1724 – 1804](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/kant.md)
- [G. W. F. Hegel — 1770 – 1831](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/hegel.md)
- [Alexis de Tocqueville — 1805 – 1859](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/tocqueville.md)
- [Karl Marx — 1818 – 1883](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/marx.md)
- [Friedrich Nietzsche — 1844 – 1900](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/nietzsche.md)
- [Sigmund Freud — 1856 – 1939](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/freud.md)
- [Henri Bergson — 1859 – 1941](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/bergson.md)
- [Ferdinand de Saussure — 1857 – 1913](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/saussure.md)
- [Noam Chomsky — 1928 –](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/chomsky.md)
- [Alain (É. Chartier) — 1868 – 1951](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/alain.md)
- [Hannah Arendt — 1906 – 1975](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/arendt.md)
- [Marcel Duchamp — 1887 – 1968](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/duchamp.md)
- [Jean-Paul Sartre — 1905 – 1980](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/sartre.md)
- [Karl Popper — 1902 – 1994](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/popper.md)
- [Albert Einstein — 1879 – 1955](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/einstein.md)
- [Wilhelm Dilthey — 1833 – 1911](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/dilthey.md)
- [Galilée — 1564 – 1642](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/galilee.md)
- [Evangelista Torricelli — 1608 – 1647](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/torricelli.md)
- [Max Weber — 1864 – 1920](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/weber.md)
- [John Rawls — 1921 – 2002](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/rawls.md)
- [Sophocle (Antigone) — v. 496 – 406 av. J.-C.](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/sophocle.md)
- [Pierre Clastres — 1934 – 1977](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/clastres.md)
- [Calliclès — personnage de Platon](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/philosophes/callicles.md)

## Notions

- [Conscience](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/notions/conscience.md)
- [Inconscient](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/notions/inconscient.md)
- [Liberté](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/notions/liberte.md)
- [Temps](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/notions/temps.md)
- [Vérité](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/notions/verite.md)
- [Raison](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/notions/raison.md)
- [Science](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/notions/science.md)
- [Religion](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/notions/religion.md)
- [Langage](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/notions/langage.md)
- [Art](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/notions/art.md)
- [Travail](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/notions/travail.md)
- [Technique](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/notions/technique.md)
- [Nature](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/notions/nature.md)
- [Justice](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/notions/justice.md)
- [État](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/notions/etat.md)
- [Devoir](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/notions/devoir.md)
- [Bonheur](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/notions/bonheur.md)

- [notions.json](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/notions.json)
- [glossary.json](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/glossary.json)
- [quiz.json](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/quiz.json)
- [sequences.json](https://arthurjeaugey.com/revisions-philo/raw/sequences.json) (méta des séquences, sans le HTML détaillé)
